lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: It's a desolate, sad place... The peoples here seldom feed me - take me with you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry, I can't take you with me, but I will help if I can.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Not well, I have to ssssssay, but you look healthy. I wish I were healthy like you.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: *Sniff, sniff* I don't think it's me. All I can smell is dirty vyrewatches tithing the poor humans.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How long have you been here?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: As long as I can remember. So far we've not found any way out of this place, and after all, we couldn't leave these poor humans to fend for themselves.
